# MuleSoft Object Store

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version of Object Store documentation.
> See [Object Store llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/object-store/llms-full.txt) for all the Object Store documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Object Store v2 Overview](https://docs.mulesoft.com/object-store/index.md)
- [Object Store v2 REST APIs](https://docs.mulesoft.com/object-store/osv2-apis.md)
- [Configuring Connected Apps](https://docs.mulesoft.com/object-store/osv2-connected-apps.md)
- [FAQ: Object Store v2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/object-store/osv2-faq.md)
- [Using Object Store v2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/object-store/osv2-guide.md)
- [Object Store v2 Release Notes](https://docs.mulesoft.com/object-store/osv2-release-notes.md)
- [Tutorial: Store and Retrieve Data from Object Store v2](https://docs.mulesoft.com/object-store/osv2-tutorial.md)
- [Object Store v2 Rate Limiting and Billing](https://docs.mulesoft.com/object-store/osv2-usage.md)
